send.c(3) Library Functions Manual send.c(3)

NAME

send.c - ACIP protocol packet sending functions (transport-agnostic).

SYNOPSIS

Macros


#define MAX_REASONABLE_PACKET_SIZE (25 * 1024 * 1024)

Functions


asciichat_error_t packet_send_via_transport (acip_transport_t *transport, packet_type_t type, const void *payload, size_t payload_len, uint32_t client_id)
Send packet via transport with proper header (exported for generic wrappers). asciichat_error_t acip_send_audio_batch (acip_transport_t *transport, const float *samples, uint32_t num_samples, uint32_t batch_count)
asciichat_error_t acip_send_audio_opus (acip_transport_t *transport, const void *opus_data, size_t opus_len)
asciichat_error_t acip_send_audio_opus_batch (acip_transport_t *transport, const void *opus_data, size_t opus_len, const uint16_t *frame_sizes, uint32_t frame_count, uint32_t sample_rate, uint32_t frame_duration)
asciichat_error_t acip_send_ping (acip_transport_t *transport)
asciichat_error_t acip_send_pong (acip_transport_t *transport)
asciichat_error_t acip_send_error (acip_transport_t *transport, uint32_t error_code, const char *message)
asciichat_error_t acip_send_remote_log (acip_transport_t *transport, uint8_t log_level, uint8_t direction, const char *message)
asciichat_error_t acip_send_session_created (acip_transport_t *transport, const acip_session_created_t *response)
asciichat_error_t acip_send_session_info (acip_transport_t *transport, const acip_session_info_t *info)
asciichat_error_t acip_send_session_joined (acip_transport_t *transport, const acip_session_joined_t *response)

Detailed Description

ACIP protocol packet sending functions (transport-agnostic).

Implementation of send functions that work with any transport. Refactored from lib/network/av.c to use transport abstraction.

Author

Zachary Fogg me@zfo.gg

Date

January 2026

Definition in file send.c.

Macro Definition Documentation

#define MAX_REASONABLE_PACKET_SIZE (25 * 1024 * 1024)

Referenced by packet_send_via_transport().

Function Documentation

asciichat_error_t acip_send_audio_batch (acip_transport_t * transport, const float * samples, uint32_t num_samples, uint32_t batch_count)

Definition at line 126 of file send.c.

127                                                               {
128   if (!transport || !samples || num_samples == 0) {
129     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Invalid parameters");
130   }
131 
132   // Build batch header
133   audio_batch_packet_t header;
134   header.batch_count = batch_count;
135   header.total_samples = (uint32_t)num_samples;
136   header.sample_rate = (uint32_t)AUDIO_SAMPLE_RATE;
137   header.channels = 1;
138 
139   // Calculate total size (header + float samples)
140   size_t samples_size = num_samples * sizeof(float);
141   size_t total_size = sizeof(header) + samples_size;
142 
143   uint8_t *buffer = buffer_pool_alloc(NULL, total_size);
144   if (!buffer) {
145     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEMORY, "Failed to allocate buffer");
146   }
147 
148   // Copy header and samples
149   memcpy(buffer, &header, sizeof(header));
150   memcpy(buffer + sizeof(header), samples, samples_size);
151 
152   asciichat_error_t result = packet_send_via_transport(transport, PACKET_TYPE_AUDIO_BATCH, buffer, total_size, 0);
153 
154   buffer_pool_free(NULL, buffer, total_size);
155   return result;
156 }




References buffer_pool_alloc(), buffer_pool_free(),
    and packet_send_via_transport().


Referenced by client_send_thread_func(), and
    threaded_send_audio_batch_packet().






asciichat_error_t
  acip_send_audio_opus (acip_transport_t * transport, const void *
  opus_data, size_t opus_len)


Definition at line 158 of file send.c.


158                                                                                                             {
159   if (!transport || !opus_data || opus_len == 0) {
160     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Invalid parameters");
161   }
162 
163   // Convert single opus frame to batch format (frame_count=1) with standard parameters
164   // Standard: 48kHz sample rate, 20ms frame duration
165   uint16_t frame_sizes[1] = {(uint16_t)opus_len};
166   return acip_send_audio_opus_batch(transport, opus_data, opus_len, frame_sizes, 1, 48000, 20);
167 }






References acip_send_audio_opus_batch().






asciichat_error_t
  acip_send_audio_opus_batch (acip_transport_t * transport, const void *
  opus_data, size_t opus_len, const uint16_t * frame_sizes, uint32_t
  frame_count, uint32_t sample_rate, uint32_t frame_duration)


Definition at line 169 of file send.c.


171                                                                       {
172   if (!transport || !opus_data || !frame_sizes || frame_count == 0) {
173     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Invalid parameters");
174   }
175 
176   // Build batch header (16 bytes)
177   uint8_t header[16];
178   *(uint32_t *)(header + 0) = HOST_TO_NET_U32(sample_rate);
179   *(uint32_t *)(header + 4) = HOST_TO_NET_U32(frame_duration);
180   *(uint32_t *)(header + 8) = HOST_TO_NET_U32(frame_count);
181   *(uint32_t *)(header + 12) = 0; // reserved
182 
183   // Calculate sizes array size
184   size_t sizes_len = frame_count * sizeof(uint16_t);
185   size_t total_size = sizeof(header) + sizes_len + opus_len;
186 
187   uint8_t *buffer = buffer_pool_alloc(NULL, total_size);
188   if (!buffer) {
189     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEMORY, "Failed to allocate buffer");
190   }
191 
192   // Build packet: header + sizes + opus_data
193   memcpy(buffer, header, sizeof(header));
194 
195   // Convert frame sizes to network byte order before copying
196   // IMPORTANT: Server expects network byte order and will apply NET_TO_HOST_U16()
197   uint16_t *sizes_buf = (uint16_t *)(buffer + sizeof(header));
198   for (uint32_t i = 0; i < frame_count; i++) {
199     sizes_buf[i] = HOST_TO_NET_U16(frame_sizes[i]);
200   }
201 
202   memcpy(buffer + sizeof(header) + sizes_len, opus_data, opus_len);
203 
204   log_info("★ OPUS_BATCH_SEND_DEBUG: header=16, frame_count=%u, sizes_len=%zu, opus_len=%zu, TOTAL=%zu", frame_count,
205            sizes_len, opus_len, total_size);
206 
207   asciichat_error_t result = packet_send_via_transport(transport, PACKET_TYPE_AUDIO_OPUS_BATCH, buffer, total_size, 0);
208 
209   buffer_pool_free(NULL, buffer, total_size);
210   return result;
211 }






References buffer_pool_alloc(), buffer_pool_free(),
    and packet_send_via_transport().

    client_send_thread_func(), and
    threaded_send_audio_opus_batch().






asciichat_error_t
  acip_send_error (acip_transport_t * transport, uint32_t error_code,
  const char * message)


Definition at line 247 of file send.c.


247                                                                                                          {
248   if (!transport) {
249     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Invalid transport");
250   }
251 
252   // Calculate message length (max MAX_ERROR_MESSAGE_LENGTH)
253   size_t msg_len = 0;
254   if (message) {
255     msg_len = strlen(message);
256     if (msg_len > MAX_ERROR_MESSAGE_LENGTH) {
257       msg_len = MAX_ERROR_MESSAGE_LENGTH;
258     }
259   }
260 
261   error_packet_t header;
262   header.error_code = HOST_TO_NET_U32(error_code);
263   header.message_length = HOST_TO_NET_U32((uint32_t)msg_len);
264 
265   // Allocate buffer for header + message
266   size_t total_size = sizeof(header) + msg_len;
267   uint8_t *buffer = buffer_pool_alloc(NULL, total_size);
268   if (!buffer) {
269     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEMORY, "Failed to allocate buffer");
270   }
271 
272   // Build packet
273   memcpy(buffer, &header, sizeof(header));
274   if (msg_len > 0) {
275     memcpy(buffer + sizeof(header), message, msg_len);
276   }
277 
278   asciichat_error_t result = packet_send_via_transport(transport, PACKET_TYPE_ERROR_MESSAGE, buffer, total_size, 0);
279 
280   buffer_pool_free(NULL, buffer, total_size);
281   return result;
282 }






References buffer_pool_alloc(), buffer_pool_free(),
    error_code, and packet_send_via_transport().

    disconnect_client_for_bad_data().

asciichat_error_t
  acip_send_remote_log (acip_transport_t * transport, uint8_t log_level,
  uint8_t direction, const char * message)


Definition at line 284 of file send.c.


285                                                             {
286   if (!transport || !message) {
287     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Invalid transport or message");
288   }
289 
290   size_t msg_len = strlen(message);
291 
292   remote_log_packet_t header;
293   header.log_level = log_level;
294   header.direction = direction;
295   header.flags = 0;
296   header.message_length = HOST_TO_NET_U32((uint32_t)msg_len);
297 
298   size_t total_size = sizeof(header) + msg_len;
299 
300   uint8_t *buffer = buffer_pool_alloc(NULL, total_size);
301   if (!buffer) {
302     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEMORY, "Failed to allocate buffer");
303   }
304 
305   // Build packet
306   memcpy(buffer, &header, sizeof(header));
307   memcpy(buffer + sizeof(header), message, msg_len);
308 
309   asciichat_error_t result = packet_send_via_transport(transport, PACKET_TYPE_REMOTE_LOG, buffer, total_size, 0);
310 
311   buffer_pool_free(NULL, buffer, total_size);
312   return result;
313 }

References packet_send_via_transport().






asciichat_error_t
  packet_send_via_transport (acip_transport_t * transport, packet_type_t
  type, const void * payload, size_t payload_len, uint32_t client_id)


Send packet via transport with proper header (exported for generic
    wrappers). Wraps payload in ACIP packet header and sends via transport.
    Handles CRC32 calculation and network byte order conversion.




Parameters


transport Transport instance


type Packet type


payload Payload data (may be NULL if payload_len is 0)


payload_len Payload length


client_id Client ID to include in packet header


Returns


ASCIICHAT_OK on success, error code on failure


Definition at line 41 of file send.c.


42                                                                                     {
43   if (!transport) {
44     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Invalid transport");
45   }
46 
47 // Sanity check: catch suspiciously large packets (likely a bug)
48 #define MAX_REASONABLE_PACKET_SIZE (25 * 1024 * 1024) // 25 MB
49   if (payload_len > MAX_REASONABLE_PACKET_SIZE) {
50     log_error("★ PACKET_SIZE_VALIDATION_FAILURE: Attempting to send %zu bytes (%zu MB) with type=%d (0x%04x), exceeds "
51               "max %d bytes (25 MB) - likely a bug in caller's length calculation",
52               payload_len, payload_len / (1024 * 1024), type, type, MAX_REASONABLE_PACKET_SIZE);
53     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Packet payload too large: %zu bytes (max 25MB)", payload_len);
54   }
55 
56   log_info("★ PACKET_SEND_VIA_TRANSPORT START: type=%d (0x%04x), payload_len=%zu bytes, client_id=%u, transport=%p",
57            type, type, payload_len, client_id, (void *)transport);
58 
59   // Build packet header
60   packet_header_t header;
61   header.magic = HOST_TO_NET_U64(PACKET_MAGIC);
62   header.type = HOST_TO_NET_U16(type);
63   header.length = HOST_TO_NET_U32((uint32_t)payload_len);
64   header.client_id = client_id;
65 
66   // Calculate CRC32 if we have payload
67   if (payload && payload_len > 0) {
68     header.crc32 = HOST_TO_NET_U32(asciichat_crc32((const uint8_t *)payload, payload_len));
69     log_debug("★ PACKET_SEND: CRC32=0x%08x calculated for %zu byte payload", header.crc32, payload_len);
70   } else {
71     header.crc32 = 0;
72     log_debug("★ PACKET_SEND: No payload, CRC32=0");
73   }
74 
75   log_debug("★ PACKET_SEND: magic=0x%016llx, type=%d, length=%u bytes, client_id=%u", header.magic, type, header.length,
76             header.client_id);
77 
78   // Calculate total packet size
79   size_t total_size = sizeof(header) + payload_len;
80   log_debug("★ PACKET_SEND: Header=%zu bytes + Payload=%zu bytes = Total=%zu bytes", sizeof(header), payload_len,
81             total_size);
82 
83   // Allocate buffer for complete packet
84   uint8_t *packet = SAFE_MALLOC(total_size, uint8_t *);
85   if (!packet) {
86     log_error("★ PACKET_SEND: Memory allocation FAILED for %zu byte packet buffer", total_size);
87     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEMORY, "Failed to allocate packet buffer");
88   }
89 
90   log_debug("★ PACKET_SEND: Packet buffer allocated at %p", (void *)packet);
91 
92   // Build complete packet: header + payload
93   memcpy(packet, &header, sizeof(header));
94   if (payload && payload_len > 0) {
95     memcpy(packet + sizeof(header), payload, payload_len);
96     log_debug("★ PACKET_SEND: Payload copied to buffer offset %zu", sizeof(header));
97   }
98 
99   // Send via transport (transport handles encryption if crypto_ctx present)
100   // Transport does NOT take ownership - it only copies data to its own buffers
101   log_info("★ PACKET_SEND: Calling acip_transport_send with %zu total bytes", total_size);
102   asciichat_error_t result = acip_transport_send(transport, packet, total_size);
103 
104   if (result == ASCIICHAT_OK) {
105     log_info("★ PACKET_SEND_VIA_TRANSPORT COMPLETE: SUCCESS - sent %zu bytes (type=%d, client_id=%u)", total_size, type,
106              client_id);
107   } else {
108     log_error("★ PACKET_SEND_VIA_TRANSPORT FAILED: acip_transport_send returned error %d (%s) when sending %zu bytes "
109               "type=%d to client_id=%u",
110               result, asciichat_error_string(result), total_size, type, client_id);
111   }
112 
113   // Always free the packet buffer
114   SAFE_FREE(packet);
115   return result;
116 }






References MAX_REASONABLE_PACKET_SIZE.

    acip_send_audio_batch(), acip_send_audio_opus_batch(),
    acip_send_capabilities(), acip_send_clear_console(),

    acip_send_error(), acip_send_image_frame(),
    acip_send_image_frame_h265(), acip_send_ping(),
    acip_send_pong(), acip_send_protocol_version(),
    acip_send_remote_log(), acip_send_server_state(),
    acip_send_session_created(), acip_send_session_info(),
    acip_send_session_joined(), acip_send_stream_start(),
    acip_send_stream_stop(), client_send_thread_func(),
    crypto_handshake_client_key_exchange(),
    crypto_handshake_server_auth_challenge(),
    crypto_handshake_server_complete(),
    crypto_handshake_server_start(), threaded_send_audio_opus(),
    threaded_send_packet(), and
  websocket_client_send_packet().
